sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18021" key="au)toxeiri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-χειρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n18021.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">do a thing</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">commit a murder with one's own hand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1591.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.154</biblScope></bibl>, where the word is called <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παμμίαρον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
